_comment: Two variants below: (1) FREE stdio (local) and (2) PAID HTTP (hosted at mcp.catetus.com).
Pick ONE entry under `mcpServers.catetus` — uncomment the variant you want and delete the other.
FREE TIER (stdio, no key): exposes analyze, list_presets, list_scenes, get_scene,
PAID TIER (CATETUS_API_KEY set): additionally exposes encode, score_fidelity, repack,
EASIEST INSTALL: drag the Catetus .mcpb bundle onto Claude Desktop instead (one-click).

catetus._comment: FREE + PAID via stdio. Omit CATETUS_API_KEY entirely (delete the env block) to use the free tier.

catetus-hosted-disabled._comment: Alternative: hosted HTTP transport at mcp.catetus.com (paid only; key required). Rename this key to `catetus` and delete the stdio entry above to use this one. Claude Desktop 0.10+ supports remote MCP servers via the `url` field.
